# Case chunk-splitting - rspack: Step 1

## Changed Files
- lib-common.module.css

## Asset Files
- Bundle: index.js
- Bundle: index/template.js
- Bundle: lib-common.js
- Bundle: main1/template.js
- Bundle: main2.js
- Bundle: main2/template.js
- Bundle: main3.js
- Bundle: main3/template.js
- Bundle: main4.js
- Bundle: main4/template.js
- Manifest: index.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json, size: 2354
- Manifest: index.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 29
- Manifest: main2.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json, size: 2354
- Manifest: main2.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 29
- Manifest: main3.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json, size: 2354
- Manifest: main3.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 29
- Manifest: main4.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json, size: 2354
- Manifest: main4.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 29
- Update: index.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 358
- Update: main2.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 358
- Update: main3.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 358
- Update: main4.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 358

## Manifest

### index.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json

```json
{
  "content": {
    "compilerOptions": {
      "enableFiberArch": true,
      "useLepusNG": true,
      "enableReuseContext": true,
      "bundleModuleMode": "ReturnByFunction",
      "debugInfoOutside": true,
      "defaultDisplayLinear": true,
      "enableCSSInvalidation": false,
      "enableCSSSelector": true,
      "enableLepusDebug": true,
      "enableRemoveCSSScope": false,
      "targetSdkVersion": "3.2",
      "defaultOverflowVisible": true
    },
    "sourceContent": {
      "dsl": "react_nodiff",
      "appType": "card",
      "config": {
        "lepusStrict": true,
        "useNewSwiper": true,
        "enableNewIntersectionObserver": true,
        "enableNativeList": true,
        "syncXElementRegistry": true,
        "enableA11y": true,
        "enableAccessibilityElement": false,
        "enableCSSInheritance": false,
        "enableNewGesture": false,
        "removeDescendantSelectorScope": false,
        "debugMetadataUrl": ""
      }
    },
    "css": {
      "cssMap": {
        "0": [
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"red\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 16
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 6,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 10,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .jBPAxvkRBAAuu8Wj",
              "loc": {
                "line": 14,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "background-color",
                "value": "black",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 19
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 27
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".EaAGbC87LA0NCIIR",
              "loc": {
                "line": 22,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          }
        ]
      },
      "cssSource": {
        "0": "/cssId/0.css"
      },
      "contentMap": {}
    },
    "lepusCode": {
      "lepusChunk": {}
    },
    "manifest": {},
    "customSections": {}
  },
  "deps": {
    "0": []
  }
}
```

```json
  "m": []
```

### main2.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json

```json
{
  "content": {
    "compilerOptions": {
      "enableFiberArch": true,
      "useLepusNG": true,
      "enableReuseContext": true,
      "bundleModuleMode": "ReturnByFunction",
      "debugInfoOutside": true,
      "defaultDisplayLinear": true,
      "enableCSSInvalidation": false,
      "enableCSSSelector": true,
      "enableLepusDebug": true,
      "enableRemoveCSSScope": false,
      "targetSdkVersion": "3.2",
      "defaultOverflowVisible": true
    },
    "sourceContent": {
      "dsl": "react_nodiff",
      "appType": "card",
      "config": {
        "lepusStrict": true,
        "useNewSwiper": true,
        "enableNewIntersectionObserver": true,
        "enableNativeList": true,
        "syncXElementRegistry": true,
        "enableA11y": true,
        "enableAccessibilityElement": false,
        "enableCSSInheritance": false,
        "enableNewGesture": false,
        "removeDescendantSelectorScope": false,
        "debugMetadataUrl": ""
      }
    },
    "css": {
      "cssMap": {
        "0": [
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"red\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 16
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 6,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 10,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .jBPAxvkRBAAuu8Wj",
              "loc": {
                "line": 14,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "background-color",
                "value": "black",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 19
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 27
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".EaAGbC87LA0NCIIR",
              "loc": {
                "line": 22,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          }
        ]
      },
      "cssSource": {
        "0": "/cssId/0.css"
      },
      "contentMap": {}
    },
    "lepusCode": {
      "lepusChunk": {}
    },
    "manifest": {},
```

### main3.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json

```json
{
  "content": {
    "compilerOptions": {
      "enableFiberArch": true,
      "useLepusNG": true,
      "enableReuseContext": true,
      "bundleModuleMode": "ReturnByFunction",
      "debugInfoOutside": true,
      "defaultDisplayLinear": true,
      "enableCSSInvalidation": false,
      "enableCSSSelector": true,
      "enableLepusDebug": true,
      "enableRemoveCSSScope": false,
      "targetSdkVersion": "3.2",
      "defaultOverflowVisible": true
    },
    "sourceContent": {
      "dsl": "react_nodiff",
      "appType": "card",
      "config": {
        "lepusStrict": true,
        "useNewSwiper": true,
        "enableNewIntersectionObserver": true,
        "enableNativeList": true,
        "syncXElementRegistry": true,
        "enableA11y": true,
        "enableAccessibilityElement": false,
        "enableCSSInheritance": false,
        "enableNewGesture": false,
        "removeDescendantSelectorScope": false,
        "debugMetadataUrl": ""
      }
    },
    "css": {
      "cssMap": {
        "0": [
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"red\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 16
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 6,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 10,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .jBPAxvkRBAAuu8Wj",
              "loc": {
                "line": 14,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "background-color",
                "value": "black",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 19
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 27
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".EaAGbC87LA0NCIIR",
              "loc": {
                "line": 22,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          }
        ]
      },
      "cssSource": {
        "0": "/cssId/0.css"
      },
      "contentMap": {}
    },
    "lepusCode": {
      "lepusChunk": {}
    },
    "manifest": {},
    "customSections": {}
  },
  "deps": {
    "0": []
  }
}
```

### main4.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json

```json
{
  "content": {
    "compilerOptions": {
      "enableFiberArch": true,
      "useLepusNG": true,
      "enableReuseContext": true,
      "bundleModuleMode": "ReturnByFunction",
      "debugInfoOutside": true,
      "defaultDisplayLinear": true,
      "enableCSSInvalidation": false,
      "enableCSSSelector": true,
      "enableLepusDebug": true,
      "enableRemoveCSSScope": false,
      "targetSdkVersion": "3.2",
      "defaultOverflowVisible": true
    },
    "sourceContent": {
      "dsl": "react_nodiff",
      "appType": "card",
      "config": {
        "lepusStrict": true,
        "useNewSwiper": true,
        "enableNewIntersectionObserver": true,
        "enableNativeList": true,
        "syncXElementRegistry": true,
        "enableA11y": true,
        "enableAccessibilityElement": false,
        "enableCSSInheritance": false,
        "enableNewGesture": false,
        "removeDescendantSelectorScope": false,
        "debugMetadataUrl": ""
      }
    },
    "css": {
      "cssMap": {
        "0": [
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"red\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 7,
                  "column": 16
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 6,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 11,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .dJcfehYKEBi0o5Mu",
              "loc": {
                "line": 10,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "color",
                "value": "\"blue\"",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 8
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 15,
                  "column": 17
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": "--- .jBPAxvkRBAAuu8Wj",
              "loc": {
                "line": 14,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          },
          {
            "type": "StyleRule",
            "style": [
              {
                "name": "background-color",
                "value": "black",
                "keyLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 19
                },
                "valLoc": {
                  "line": 23,
                  "column": 27
                }
              }
            ],
            "selectorText": {
              "value": ".EaAGbC87LA0NCIIR",
              "loc": {
                "line": 22,
                "column": 18
              }
            },
            "variables": {}
          }
        ]
      },
      "cssSource": {
        "0": "/cssId/0.css"
      },
      "contentMap": {}
    },
    "lepusCode": {
      "lepusChunk": {}
    },
    "manifest": {},
    "customSections": {}
```

### main4.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{
  "c": [
    "main4"
  ],
  "r": [],
  "m": []
}
```


## Update


### index.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
exports.ids = ["index"];
exports.modules = {};
exports.runtime = function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();
// webpack/runtime/lynx css hot update
(() => {

__webpack_require__.cssHotUpdateList = [["index","index.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json"]];

})();

}
;
;
```



### main2.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
exports.ids = ["main2"];
exports.modules = {};
exports.runtime = function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();
// webpack/runtime/lynx css hot update
(() => {

__webpack_require__.cssHotUpdateList = [["main2","main2.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json"]];

})();

}
;
;
```

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
exports.ids = ["main3"];
exports.modules = {};
exports.runtime = function(__webpack_require__) {

})();

})();

}
;
;
```



### main4.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
exports.ids = ["main4"];
exports.modules = {};
exports.runtime = function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();
// webpack/runtime/lynx css hot update
(() => {

__webpack_require__.cssHotUpdateList = [["main4","main4.LAST_HASH.css.hot-update.json"]];

})();

}
;
;
```
